data.content: Plan review approved. The 6-step plan is well-structured, correctly identifies existing owner/artifact primitives (StepOwner, ProfileOwners, ActionOutputDef, owner_kind_for_state), and follows a sound schema→runtime→views→logs→docs→tests dependency chain. Test strategy covers 3 required workflow patterns. Minor notes for implementation: (1) both upstream blockers (knots-5464, knots-3239) are still in-progress — coordinate rather than duplicate; (2) reviewer inspection guidance attachment point in the profile model needs clarification during implementation; (3) bundle parser extensions should define explicit defaulting logic for backward compatibility. None of these are plan-level blockers.
